ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., weapon, potion, ring) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the item in in-game currency */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "durability" INTEGER /* Durability of the item */,
  "equippable" INTEGER /* Whether the item can be equipped */,
  "usable" INTEGER /* Whether the item can be used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the character (e.g., wizard, rogue, warrior) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the character (e.g., human, elf, dwarf) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the character */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "health_points" INTEGER /* Health points of the character */,
  "mana_points" INTEGER /* Mana points of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., transferred, expended) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item involved in the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item involved */,
  "source_character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who is the source of the transaction */,
  "destination_character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who is the destination of the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_source_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_destination_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the character's inventory */,
  "equipped" INTEGER /* Whether the item is equipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_inventory_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., city, tavern, dungeon) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_transactions" (
  "item_transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item involved in the transaction */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Source location of the item */,
  "destination_location" TEXT /* Destination location of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_transactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_transactions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character relationship */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "related_character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related character */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., friend, enemy, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_relationships_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_relationships_related_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)
